title: Corelib test import codemod (Testing.Assert normalization)

source.subject: Progress on full corelib test pass

body:
Normalize corelib test entries to `use Testing.Assert` with unqualified `Assert.*` calls via `normalize_corelib_test_imports.py`; closes unknown-`Testing` resolve failures across the 42-target matrix.

## What shipped

- [`normalize_corelib_test_imports.py`](compiler/corelib/ci/normalize_corelib_test_imports.py) codemod applied across `corelib_tests` entries
- Test sources follow README import closure (e.g. [`FormatMarkdownTests.bd`](compiler/corelib/beskid_corelib/tests/corelib_tests/obj/beskid/root/src/console/FormatMarkdownTests.bd))

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`f84572b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/f84572b)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07
